seo_title: 8 Gemini Tips for Organizing Your Space (and Life) - Google Blog
meta_description: Discover how to use AI-powered tips from Gemini to organize your home and digital space, declutter your inbox, and create a cleaning schedule.
body_html:
Direct answer: Gemini is a generative artificial intelligence chatbot and virtual assistant developed by Google, powered by large language models (LLMs).

1. Create a Cleaning Schedule with AI-Powered Tips

Use Gemini's cleaning schedule template to plan your spring cleaning tasks. Get personalized cleaning tips and reminders from Gemini. Declutter your space with Gemini's decluttering guide.

2. Declutter Your Inbox with AI-Powered Tools

3. Organize Your Home with AI-Powered Tips Use Gemini's home organization tips to create a peaceful and clutter-free living space.

Learn how to use Gemini Live for virtual events and meetings. Get tips on how to improve your presentation skills with Gemini Live. Discover how to use Gemini Live for customer support and service.

Read the full article to learn more about how to use AI-powered tools from Gemini to organize your space, declutter your inbox, and create a cleaning schedule.
